task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer web admin, on the Styles page or New Style editor, the style name field is filled with 'clustered_places'.

task_completion.description: Configure the gs:PointStacker rendering transformation with a cellSize of 60
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor text area, look for an <ogc:Function name="gs:PointStacker"> block containing a parameter for 'cellSize' with an <ogc:Literal> value of 60.

task_completion.description: Define a rendering rule for clusters (count > 1) as a Blue Circle (size 22) with a White label
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor XML, look for a Rule with a filter for count > 1. It must contain a PointSymbolizer with a 'circle' WellKnownName, fill color '#0000FF', and size '22'. It must also have a TextSymbolizer labeling the 'count' property with a white fill (e.g., '#FFFFFF').

task_completion.description: Define a rendering rule for single points (count = 1) as a Red Star (size 12)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor XML, look for a Rule with a filter for count = 1 (or count == 1). It must contain a PointSymbolizer with a 'star' WellKnownName, fill color '#FF0000', and size '12'.

task_completion.description: Set 'clustered_places' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Edit Layer page for 'ne:ne_populated_places', under the Publishing tab, the 'Default Style' dropdown must have 'clustered_places' selected.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GeoServer web admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the GeoServer UI (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/), not just terminal curl commands or local text editors.

integrity.description: The agent successfully validated and saved the SLD style.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Validate' button being used without errors in the style editor, or a green success message at the top of the screen indicating the style or layer was saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected style name is 'clustered_places'. The target layer is 'ne:ne_populated_places'. The rendering transformation must be 'gs:PointStacker' with a 'cellSize' of 60. The cluster color must be Blue (#0000FF) and the single point color must be Red (#FF0000). The SLD must contain rules filtering by the 'count' attribute generated by the PointStacker.
